product_overview: A multi-tenant web application that replaces paper menus with a branded, bilingual QR-driven ordering experience for guests and provides admin and staff dashboards for menu management and order handling.
core_goals: Enable zero-friction guest ordering via table QR links without requiring authentication
Provide admins with secure menu item CRUD and tenant-specific theming
Support role-based redirects for staff (cashier/waiter) to their realtime dashboards
Deliver real-time order and waiter-call synchronization using Supabase
Maintain a bilingual (Arabic/English) design system with tenant theming

features.name: Guest Ordering Flow
features.description: Allow guests to open a restaurant menu via table QR, browse items, add items to a cart, and place an order; then show an order confirmation / QR page.
user_flows: Navigate to /susushi/menu?table=1 -> See menu items on page -> Click add to cart on a menu item -> See cart updated -> Navigate to /susushi/checkout -> Review order summary -> Click place order / Confirm and Generate QR -> Land on /susushi/qr and see order confirmation

Navigate to /susushi/menu?table=1 -> Click add to cart on a menu item -> Navigate to /susushi/checkout -> Click place order / Confirm and Generate QR -> Receive order submission error -> See error message and remain on /susushi/checkout

features.name: Admin Login and Create Menu Item
features.description: Authenticate as a restaurant admin, access the admin dashboard, create a new menu item, and verify it appears in the restaurant menu list.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input (admin credentials) -> Fill password input -> Click Sign in -> Redirect to /admin -> Navigate to /admin/menu -> Click Add Item -> Fill item name and price and category -> Click Create item -> See new item in list
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input (invalid admin credentials) -> Fill password input -> Click Sign in -> See authentication error message and remain on /login

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input (admin credentials) -> Fill password input -> Click Sign in -> Redirect to /admin -> Navigate to /admin/menu -> Click Add Item -> Leave required fields empty -> Click Create item -> See validation errors and stay on the Add Item form

features.name: Staff RBAC Cashier Redirect
features.description: Allow staff with the cashier role to sign in and be redirected directly to the restaurant cashier hall/dashboard for order processing.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input (cashier credentials) -> Fill password input -> Click Sign in -> System redirects to /susushi/cashier -> See cashier/hall overview heading
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input (cashier credentials) -> Fill password input (wrong) -> Click Sign in -> See authentication error message and remain on /login

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input (staff missing cashier role) -> Fill password input -> Click Sign in -> Authentication succeeds but role not authorized -> See access denied or redirected to a safe page

routes.description: User login with email and password
Menu browse and add to cart

features.name: Guest Ordering Flow
features.description: Navigate to menu with table, add item to cart, go to checkout, place order
user_interactions: Click add to cart on a menu item
Click place order / Confirm and Generate QR

features.name: Admin Login and Create Menu Item
features.description: Login as admin, go to admin menu, create a new menu item
user_interactions: Fill item name and price and category
